VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.label: psychic resonator
VREAndroids.AndroidGeneDef.description: A lattice of archotech filament grown through the persona core, tuned to the same band the psychic hardware of a living brain works in. It does not simulate a mind; it gives an existing one a surface that psychic energy can push against.\n\nOverrides the deafness built into every synthetic chassis. What comes back is the full range: psycasts, psychic implants, and every psychic phenomenon that was previously simply absent, including the unpleasant ones.
